::: {#Learning_Objectives .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [   ]{.text-T6}[After completion of this course you will:]{.text-T6}

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        the definition of the terms "Internationalization" and
        "Localization]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Understand
        different approaches to develop international
        software]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Be
        familiar with issues that may differ  in international
        markets]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T7}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

    specific to each programming language and is addressed in other
    courses]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd}

::: {#Why_go_international? .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Why go international?]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Growth of
    Internet/Languages]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Opportunity
    of International markets during downturn in your domestic
    market]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Growth
    potential]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Competitive
    advantage]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

:::

::: {#International_Approaches .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [International Approaches]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.853cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Separate
    product for each international market]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Single
    product with conditional compiles for each international
    market]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Modularized
    product that supports all markets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Separate_Products_Approach .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Separate Products Approach]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Each
    international market has it's own product source base and
    executable]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Number of
    products grows with the number of markets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Maintenance
    needs expanding number of staff to
    implement]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Separate Products Approach

</div>
:::

::: {#Single_Product__Conditional_Compiles .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Single Product/]{.text-T6}[\
    ]{.text-T6}[Conditional Compiles]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Single
    source tree contains conditional compiles for each international
    market]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Compile
    separate executables for each market]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Maintenance
    may need to be applied multiple times, once for each section of
    conditional code]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

1.  Modularized Product

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

::: {#page15 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Modularized Product]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Modularize
    the product into two parts:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Generic
        product part that is independent of any
        language]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Market-specific
        part that provides support for language and cultural
        expectations]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Modularized_Product .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Modularized Product]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This
    modularization is commonly known as
    ]{.text-T6}[Internationalization]{.text-T19}[ and
    ]{.text-T6}[Localization]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Definitions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:6.349cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Definitions]{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P16 .graphic-pr2 style="height:4.868cm;width:17.78cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:3.81cm; top:10.795cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page18 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Definitions]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ ]{.text-T6}[Internationalization (I18n)]{.text-T20}

    [  ]{.text-T6}[The process of developing software that supports
    different languages, character sets or sets of cultural dependencies
    without modifying the software.]{.text-T6}

    []{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Definitions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Definitions]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [             ]{.text-T21}[Localization (L10n)]{.text-T20}

    [   ]{.text-T6}[The process of adapting software to support a
    specific language, character set and cultural dependencies. This
    process may include translating the user interface and pieces of
    technical communication.]{.text-T6}

    []{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Advantages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Advantages]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Advantages
    of Internationalization include:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[One
        product to develop and maintain]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Easily
        extends support to new
        markets/languages]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Disadvantages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Disadvantages]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Disadvantages
    include:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[More
        time needed to develop fully internationalized
        product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[New
        I18n skills needed]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#I18n_L10n_Diagram .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  I18n/L10n Diagram

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {# I18n_Clarification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ ]{.text-T6}[I18n Clarification]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Internationalization
    is ]{.text-T6}[NOT ]{.text-T8}[programming in a foreign
    language]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Internationalization
    is learning how to use a different set of
    tools]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Internationalization
    is supporting all languages/character sets important to your
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#I18n_and_Performance .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [I18n and Performance]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Internationalization
    may have a performance impact on your
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Always
    consider performance implications during design of internationalized
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More_Definitions  .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Even More Definitions ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [                 ]{.text-T6}[MultiLingual]{.text-T20}

    [   ]{.text-T6}[The ability to process and support multiple
    languages in the same environment ]{.text-T6}

    []{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Internationalization_and_Multilingual .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Internationalization and Multilingual]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Internationalization
    enables the support of different languages, but is focused on
    supporting one language at a time.]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Multilingual
    support is a more complex problem than Internationalization and will
    not be covered by this course]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#International_Distributed_Computing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [International Distributed Computing]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[In
    international distributed applications, multiple language
    environments may be supported in different parts of the distributed
    environment]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This is
    also a more complex problem than
    Internationalization]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Objections_to_I18n  .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Objections to I18n ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:23.071cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.481cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Why don't they learn my language??"]{.text-T22}[\
    ]{.text-T22}[]{.text-T22}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[How would
    you like to have the following prompt on your Nintendo
    system:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [次のガムを始めたいですか]{.text-T23}[?]{.text-T23}

-   []{.text-T23}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Objections_to_I18n  .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Objections to I18n ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr9 style="height:11.853cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.079cm; "}
<div>

1.  ["]{.text-T24}[I don't know nothing about any foreign
    language."]{.text-T24}

-   []{.text-T25}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[You don't
    need to to be able to speak a foreign language to internationalize
    your product]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This course
    will provide most of the information you will need to know about
    foreign languages]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#International_Writing_Systems .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:7.407cm; "}
<div>

1.  [International Writing Systems]{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Writing_Systems .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Writing Systems]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [   ]{.text-T6}[Different types of writing systems
    include:]{.text-T6}

-   -   -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.635cm;"}[U.S.
            English]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.635cm;"}[Latin1/European]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.635cm;"}[Ideographic
            writing systems]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.635cm;"}[Bi-Directional
            Writing Systems]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        -   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.635cm;"}[Others\...]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#U_S__English .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [U.S. English]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Most
    programming books teach us to support U.S.
    English]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Character
    set is ASCII (characters include a-z, A-Z, 0-9 and special
    characters)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Less than
    128 characters, so each character can be uniquely stored in less
    than one byte (7 bits)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Latin1_Diacritic_Characters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Latin1/Diacritic Characters]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Latin1 is a
    common name for the character in the PFIGS languages
    (]{.text-T6}[P]{.text-T26}[ortuguese]{.text-T27}[,
    ]{.text-T6}[F]{.text-T26}[rench, ]{.text-T6}[I]{.text-T26}[talian,
    ]{.text-T6}[G]{.text-T26}[erman, ]{.text-T6}[S]{.text-T26}[panish
    (and British English))]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Formally
    named ISO 8859-1]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page34 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Latin1/Diacritic Characters]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[These
    languages have characters not found in U.S. English
    (]{.text-T28}[like à]{.text-T29}[, ]{.text-T28}[è and é in
    French,]{.text-T29}[ ß and ü in German and ]{.text-T30}[ç in
    Spanish]{.text-T29}[)]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Less than
    256 characters, so each character can still be uniquely stored in
    one byte/8-bits]{.text-T30}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T30}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Ideographic_Languages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Ideographic Languages]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Language
    that use ideographs include]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Japanese]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Chinese]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Korean
        (Some of the time)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Ideographs
    are sometimes called pictographs. They began as pictures of the
    word/idea]{.text-T6}[ ]{.text-T31}[\
    ]{.text-T31}[]{.text-T31}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Japanese .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Japanese]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Japan
    identified the "official" set of
    characters:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Kanji
        (Ideographic) -- 1900+]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Hiragana
        -- 46 + variants]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Katakana
        -- 46 + variants]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Romaji
        (alphabetic) -- around 100]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Chinese__Taiwan_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Chinese (Taiwan)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The Chinese
    language uses only ideographic characters[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Number of
    characters ranges from 3000-4000[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Traditional
    form of characters continues to be used[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Chinese__PRC_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Chinese (PRC)

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-    

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The People's
    Republic of China uses a set of simplified ideographic characters
    (still 3000-4000)[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Ideographic_Languages .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Ideographic Languages]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Ideographic
    character fonts are commonly twice as wide as alphabetic
    characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Because of
    these large number of characters, a single byte will not be
    sufficient to store these characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page40 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Ideographic Languages]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Instead of
    the single-byte character used for U.S. English, one of the
    following approaches will be needed:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Each
        character is stored in a fixed number of bytes (2 or 4
        bytes)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[A
        variable number of bytes will be used to store the
        character]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Bi-Directional_Writing_Systems .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Bi-Directional Writing Systems]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Bi-directional
    writing systems have characters written in two different
    directions:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Local
        language characters are written from Right to Left
        (RTL)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Alphabetic
        characters and numbers are written Left to Right
        (LTR)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page42 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:17.568cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:7.197cm; top:0.846cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Bi-Directional Writing Systems]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Languages
    that use bi-directional writing system
    include:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Hebrew]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Arabic
        Script]{.text-T6}[\
        ]{.text-T6}[(Used for Arabic, Farsi and Central Asian
        Languages)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Other_Writing_Systems .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Other Writing Systems]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Other
    writing system use different characters:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Cyrillic
        (Russian and Bulgarian)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Korean]{.text-T6}[\
        ]{.text-T6}[(Hangul phonetic system)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Indic
        Scripts]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Others
        \...]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Levels_of_Internationalization .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Levels of Internationalization]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Depending
    on the international markets your are targeting, you can categorize
    Internationalization into the following
    levels/categories:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[U.S.
        English Only]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Latin1/Western
        European]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Large
        Number of Characters/Asian]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Bi-Directional
        Characters/Middle-East]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Internationalization_Issues .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:21.59cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:7.619cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Internationalization Issues]{.text-T9}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#page46 .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Internationalization Issues]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[In addition
    to supporting different languages/characters, you will also need to
    support different processing and display of
    information]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This
    section identifies issues that vary in international
    markets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Storage_and_Display .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Storage and Display]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr10 style="height:9.314cm;width:11.113cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.904cm; top:8.678cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Hard-coded
        Text ]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Ambiguous
        Text]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Messages
        Used Multiple Times]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Yes/No
        Questions]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Buffering]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr11 style="height:9.102cm;width:11.96cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:12.488cm; top:8.678cm; "}
<div>

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Backspacing]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Data
        Array Pointers]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        Set Assumptions]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        Encoding Assumptions]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T32}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Hard-coded_Text_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Hard-coded Text ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A "print"
    statement with hard-coded text ties the product to a specific
    language[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}This is a
    problem with text visible to the user[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Hard-coded_Text_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Hard-coded Text ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}It is not a
    problem with text use for:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Debugging
        Messages[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}Log
        Messages[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}System
        Administration Messages[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Even_More__Hard-Coded_Text .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Even More ]{.text-T6}[\
    ]{.text-T6}[Hard-Coded Text]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    approach to internationalization is:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Replace
        hard-coded text with a message
        identifier]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Associate
        text with message identifier and place in a separate "resource"
        file]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Translate
        "resource" file contents]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Dynamically
        retrieve message identifier/text from "resource" file for
        language of user]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Hard-Coded__Text_Example .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr1 style="height:3.175cm;width:16.087cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:7.407cm; top:0.634cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Hard-Coded ]{.text-T6}[\
    ]{.text-T6}[Text Example]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Before
    internationalization:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [print("The Text in English.");]{.text-T34}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[After
    internationalization:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [print(get_resource(MSG_TEXT));]{.text-T34}

    []{.text-T34}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Ambiguous_Text .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Ambiguous Text]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Ambiguous
    text is a problem even in the domestic
    market]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[When
    translator is working, they may misinterpret the
    message]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[All
    messages should be reviewed, clarified and possibly re-written
    before translation]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Messages_Used_Multiple_Times .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Messages Used Multiple Times]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Messages
    used multiple times are usually used for different
    purposes]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[When
    translating, different translations may be used for each
    purpose]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Review
    messages to remove different messages used for different
    purposes]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  []{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Yes_No_Questions_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Yes/No Questions ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr12 style="height:12.065cm;width:24.553cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.846cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Yes/No
    questions sometimes have different foreign answers depending on the
    expectation[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  Question: "You wouldn't like some coffee?"

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[U.S.
        English Answer: No ]{.text-T41}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   1.  (I would not like some coffee.)

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Japanese
        Answer: Yes ]{.text-T41}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   1.  (I would not like some coffee.)

             

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Yes_No_Questions .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Yes/No Questions

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Make sure
    you do not have the "Yes/No" question hard-coded in your
    product[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Make sure
    that your expected response is not a "Y", "y", "N" or
    "n"[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Buffering .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Buffering]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Text
    buffering becomes a serious problem when supporting Japanese or
    Chinese]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Twenty U.S.
    English ASCII characters use twenty (20) bytes of
    storage]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Twenty
    Japanese or Chinese characters may use forty (40) to  eighty (80)
    bytes of storage]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Data_Array_Pointers .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Data Array Pointers]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Pointers to
    character arrays often use the "increment" operator when supporting
    ASCII characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [pointer++;]{.text-T42}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Pointer
    increments may not work correctly if character is stored using two
    bytes or a variable number of bytes]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Backspacing .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Backspacing]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   []{.text-T6}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Text
    backspacing may also encounter problems when the characters are
    stored using multiple bytes]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

<div>

1.  [Character Set Assumptions]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Most
    programming books teach us to only support U.S.
    English:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T14}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [if ( char \>= 'A' && char \<= 'Z') {]{.text-T43}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   1.  [\...]{.text-T42}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [}]{.text-T43}

        []{.text-T43}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[What about
    Latin1 special characters?]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The previous
    example also has an assumption about character
    encoding:[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [if ( char \>= 'A' && char \<= 'Z') {]{.text-T44}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   1.  [\...]{.text-T42}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   1.  [}]{.text-T44}

        []{.text-T45}

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}ASCII values
    are assumed for each character[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {#Text_Input .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Input]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Imagine a
    keyboard for Chinese or Japanese (large character
    sets!!!)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Using a
    very large keyboard would need a very skilled
    typist]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Most
    Chinese or Japanese systems use a regular keyboard with an "Input
    Method"]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [ ]{.text-T25}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Input_Method .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Input Method

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An Input
    Method maps multiple keystrokes to a specific
    character[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}An Input
    Method is a separate process, so your application does not need to
    be responsible[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Your
    application needs to be able to communicate and cooperate with the
    Input Method[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [ ]{.text-T41}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Input_Method .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Input Method

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}Usually, the
    user phonetically types in the word (i.e., "yomu")[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}The input
    Method may convert it into the local character set (i.e.,
    "[よむ]{.text-T47}")[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}A conversion
    to ideographic characters is performed, and the user chooses the
    specific character (i.e.,     "[読む]{.text-T47}")[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Concatenation_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Concatenation ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Most every
    software product uses text concatenation to build user
    messages]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

1.  [print("There are " + user_num + ]{.text-T34}

    [         "]{.text-T34}[current users." );]{.text-T34}

-   []{.text-T34}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Text_Concatenation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Text Concatenation]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The problem
    is that when the message is translated, the order of the words may
    be different]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Some
    programming languages support text
    concatenation]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[General
    advice is to avoid text concatenation]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Classification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Classification]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Some
    languages do not have the concept of Upper-/Lower-case
    characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Some
    languages use characters other than alphabetic
    character]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Character_Classification .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Character Classification]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr15 style="height:11.231cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.701cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Products
    may need to be re-worked if they make assumptions about case and
    characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Character_Sorting .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Character Sorting]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Many
    products perform character sorting using code like
    below:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

```{=html}
<!-- -->
```
-   -   1.  [if ('a' \< 'b') {]{.text-T48}

            [\...]{.text-T48}

            [}]{.text-T48}

            []{.text-T48}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Character_Sorting .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Character Sorting]{.text-T49}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This code
    depends on U.S. English ASCII characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[It will not
    sort European or Asian characters correctly]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Hyphenation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Hyphenation]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Hyphenation
    rules depend on the language]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Hyphenation
    code must either be     re-worked or added to the Localization
    package for each language]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#_Text_Delimiters .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ ]{.text-T6}[Text Delimiters]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Text
    Delimiters in U.S. English separate words, phrases and
    sentences]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Text
    delimiters vary depending on the language (i.e., Japanese and
    Chinese do ]{.text-T6}[NOT]{.text-T19}[ have a space between
    words)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Your
    product needs to be independent of text
    delimiters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Punctuation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Punctuation]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Punctuation
    varies depending on language]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Spanish
    uses the following character as a "question mark]{.text-T50}[" --
    "]{.text-T28}[¿]{.text-T51}["]{.text-T50}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Your
    product needs to support a variety of punctuation
    marks]{.text-T50}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T50}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Capitalization .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Capitalization]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:24.13cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.27cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[U.S.
    developers are used to capitalization of:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[The
        first word of a sentence]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Names]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Titles]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This is not
    true in all languages]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Capitalization .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Capitalization]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   []{.text-T6}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't
    assume capitalization in foreign markets will follow the same rules
    as the domestic market]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Text_Search .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Text Search]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:23.918cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.482cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Text
    searching for the German name "M]{.text-T28}[ü]{.text-T30}[ller"
    needs to match all of the following text
    strings:]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}["]{.text-T28}[M]{.text-T28}[ü]{.text-T30}[ller"]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}["]{.text-T28}[M]{.text-T28}[u]{.text-T30}[¨]{.text-T50}[ller"]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}["]{.text-T28}[Mueller"]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Text
    searching must be internationalized or added to the L10n
    package]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

-   []{.text-T6}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Spelling
    rules depend on the language]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Spell
    Checking code must be added to the Localization
    package]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd}

<div>

1.  [  ]{.text-T28}[The following Internationalization issues exist for
    the use of Fonts:]{.text-T28}[ ]{.text-T29}

-   -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Font
        Sets]{.text-T29}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Font]{.text-T29}[
        Size]{.text-T28}[\
        ]{.text-T28}[ ]{.text-T28}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>

::: {#Font_Sets .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Font Sets]{.text-T29}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[You need
    the correct font set to display foreign
    characters]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Make sure
    your software:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Has no
        dependency on domestic font sets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Has
        the correct foreign font sets installed]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {#Font_Size .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Font]{.text-T29}[ Size]{.text-T28}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Larger
    fonts may be necessary to read complex characters like Traditional
    Chinese (]{.text-T6}[中國話]{.text-T52}[)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Make sure
    your product does not depend on a specific font
    size]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Define the
    language-specific font size in the Localization
    package]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {#Number_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Number Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr18 style="height:12.276cm;width:10.906cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.292cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    thousands separator and "decimal point" characters vary in different
    countries]{.text-T53}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The number
    of digits grouped together also varies]{.text-T53}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T53}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:10.653cm;width:11.217cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:13.335cm; top:6.138cm; "}
+:-------------------------+:---------------------------+
| 1.  [Country]{.text-T54} | 1.  [Number]{.text-T54}    |
+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| 1.  [U.S.]{.text-T55}    | 1.  [12,345.67]{.text-T55} |
+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| 1.  [Germany]{.text-T55} | 1.  [12.345,67]{.text-T55} |
+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| 1.  [France]{.text-T55}  | 1.  [12 345,67]{.text-T55} |
+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| 1.  [Russia]{.text-T55}  | 1.  [12.345 67]{.text-T55} |
+--------------------------+----------------------------+
| 1.  [Japan]{.text-T55}   | 1.  [1,2345.67]{.text-T55} |
+--------------------------+----------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:10.653cm;width:11.217cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {#Money_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Money Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:11.112cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.482cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Similar to
    number format]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Also,
    different monetary unit symbols are located at different
    positions]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:10.481cm;width:12.064cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:12.7cm; top:5.503cm; "}
+:-------------------------+:------------------------------+
| 1.  [Country]{.text-T54} | 1.  [Number]{.text-T54}       |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------+
| 1.  [U.S.]{.text-T55}    | 1.  [\$12,345.67]{.text-T55}  |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------+
| 1.  [Germany]{.text-T55} | 1.  [12.345,67 DM]{.text-T55} |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------+
| 1.  [France]{.text-T55}  | 1.  [12 345,67 F]{.text-T55}  |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------+
| 1.  [Russia]{.text-T55}  | 1.  [12.345 67p.]{.text-T55}  |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------+
| 1.  [Japan]{.text-T55}   | 1.  [¥ 1,2345.67]{.text-T55}  |
+--------------------------+-------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:10.481cm;width:12.064cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Percentage_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}

1.  Percentage Format

</div>
:::

<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Character
    designating percent varies]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Position of
    percentage designator also varies]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:10.653cm;width:6.773cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:16.933cm; top:5.715cm; "}
+:----------------------------+
| 1.  [Percentage]{.text-T54} |
+-----------------------------+
| 1.  [67 %]{.text-T57}       |
+-----------------------------+
| 1.  [67 pct]{.text-T57}     |
+-----------------------------+
| 1.  [.67]{.text-T57}        |
+-----------------------------+
| 1.  [%67]{.text-T57}        |
+-----------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:10.653cm;width:6.773cm;"}

::: {#Address_Format .page-dp3}
