<div>

1.  [Address Format]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Addresses
    vary in the following ways:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Order
        of Name/Address/Region/Country]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Zip
        Code/Postal Code/Nothing]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Number
        of lines to designate a particular
        address]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Others]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Address_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  More Address Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:11.112cm;width:18.837cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:4.022cm; top:5.503cm; "}
+:---------------------------------+:---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Country]{.text-T54}         | 1.  [Address Format]{.text-T54}  |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [PRC]{.text-T57}             | 1.  [\<Country\>]{.text-T58}     |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [\<Province\>                |
|                                  |     \<City\>]{.text-T58}         |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [\<Address\>]{.text-T58}     |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [\<LastName\> \<FirstName\>  |
|                                  |     \<Title\>]{.text-T58}        |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+
| 1.  [The Netherlands]{.text-T57} | 1.  [\<Title\> \<FirstName\>     |
|                                  |     \<LastName\>]{.text-T58}     |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [\<Address1\>]{.text-T58}    |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [\<Address2\>]{.text-T58}    |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [\<PostalCode\>              |
|                                  |     \<City\>]{.text-T58}         |
|                                  |                                  |
|                                  |     [\<Country\>]{.text-T58}     |
+----------------------------------+----------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:11.112cm;width:18.837cm;"}
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Personal_Names .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Personal Names]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Names and
    their formats will vary]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[In China,
    the Family Name comes before the Personal
    Name]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[In the
    U.S., Mr. Vanderpohl: In the Netherlands, Mr. Van der
    Pohl]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Personal_Titles .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Personal Titles]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Personal
    titles are also call "Honorifics"]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Personal
    titles vary in different countries]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Position of
    titles also varies]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[In Japan,
    the title comes after the name: Nakayama
    ]{.text-T6}[San]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T19}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Telephone_Number_Format .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  Telephone Number Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr18 style="height:12.276cm;width:10.583cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.481cm; top:5.292cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Telephone
    numbers have different numbers of digits (even in the
    U.S.)]{.text-T59}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    grouping and the display format also
    varies]{.text-T59}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T59}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:10.675cm;width:12.275cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:12.488cm; top:5.927cm; "}
+:--------------------------+:--------------------------------+
| 1.  [Country]{.text-T54}  | 1.  [Number]{.text-T54}         |
+---------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 1.  [U.S.]{.text-T55}     | 1.  [(303) 555-1212]{.text-T55} |
+---------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 1.  [France]{.text-T55}   | 1.  [12-34-56-78]{.text-T55}    |
+---------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Japan]{.text-T55}    | 1.  [1 2345-6789]{.text-T55}    |
+---------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Italy]{.text-T55}    | 1.  [(1) 2345678]{.text-T55}    |
+---------------------------+---------------------------------+
| 1.  [Thailand]{.text-T55} | 1.  [123-4567-89]{.text-T55}    |
+---------------------------+---------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:10.675cm;width:12.275cm;"}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Not only do

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Your
    product has to be able to read the data using the local

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Do not
    embed any dependencies on the names of the weekdays in your

    schedules vary]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't
    assume a work week starts on Monday and ends on
    Friday]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd}

    day of the week varies, in France it is Lundi

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd}

        Calendars]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Hebrew
        Calendars]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Japanese
        Imperial Calendar]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd}

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[If the date
    is ]{.text-T6}[6/12/01]{.text-T61}[:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[What
        month is it?]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[What
        day of the month is it?]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[What
        year is it?]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

<div>

1.  More Date Format

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr5 style="height:11.43cm;width:11.112cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.482cm; top:5.503cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The date
    format varies in the order, number of digits and the separator
    character]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:11.372cm;width:11.64cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:12.912cm; top:5.715cm; "}
+:---------------------------------+:-----------------------------+
| 1.  [Country]{.text-T54}         | 1.  [Date]{.text-T54}        |
+----------------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [U.S.]{.text-T55}            | 1.  [6/12/01]{.text-T55}     |
+----------------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [S. Africa]{.text-T55}       | 1.  [01/6/12]{.text-T55}     |
+----------------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [Singapore]{.text-T55}       | 1.  [12/6/01]{.text-T55}     |
+----------------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [The Netherlands]{.text-T55} | 1.  [12-6-01]{.text-T55}     |
+----------------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [Hungary]{.text-T55}         | 1.  [2001. 6. 12]{.text-T55} |
+----------------------------------+------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:11.372cm;width:11.64cm;"}

    there are multiple format styles, each of which will vary in
    international markets]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:10.151cm;width:12.064cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:12.7cm; top:6.35cm; "}
+:------------------------+:-----------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Format]{.text-T62} | 1.  [U.S. Date]{.text-T62}               |
+-------------------------+------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Short]{.text-T55}  | 1.  [6/12/01]{.text-T55}                 |
+-------------------------+------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Medium]{.text-T55} | 1.  [Jun. 12, 2001]{.text-T55}           |
+-------------------------+------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Long]{.text-T55}   | 1.  [June 12, 2001]{.text-T55}           |
+-------------------------+------------------------------------------+
| 1.  [Full]{.text-T55}   | 1.  [Tuesday, June 12, 2001 ]{.text-T55} |
+-------------------------+------------------------------------------+

![](data:;base64,){style="height:10.151cm;width:12.064cm;"}

1.  Time Format

:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr18 style="height:12.276cm;width:11.853cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:0.634cm; top:5.292cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[International
    time formats use a variety of separator
    characters]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Different
    time formats use a 12- or a 24-hour clock]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T56}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {.graphic-gr35 style="height:10.653cm;width:11.641cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:13.123cm; top:5.927cm; "}
+:---------------------------+:-----------------------------+
| 1.  [Country]{.text-T54}   | 1.  [Time]{.text-T54}        |
+----------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [U.S.]{.text-T55}      | 1.  [5:27 (p.m.)]{.text-T55} |
+----------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [Germany]{.text-T55}   | 1.  [17:27]{.text-T55}       |
+----------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [Sweden]{.text-T55}    | 1.  [17. 27]{.text-T55}      |
+----------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [France]{.text-T55}    | 1.  [17h27]{.text-T55}       |
+----------------------------+------------------------------+
| 1.  [Argentina]{.text-T55} | 1.  [1727]{.text-T55}        |
+----------------------------+------------------------------+

1.  [Time Zones]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:21.396cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.328cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't
    restrict your support to domestic Time
    Zones]{.text-T63}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Some Time
    Zones are 30 or 45 minutes different from adjacent Time
    Zones]{.text-T63}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Time Zones
    are a political decision, not a geographic
    decision]{.text-T63}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T63}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

1.  [Daylight Savings Time ]{.text-T6}

:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Not all
    locations support Daylight Savings Time]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't code
    dependencies on Daylight Savings Time in your
    code]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Accelerator
        Keys]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Shortcut
        Keys  ]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd}

::: {#Keyboards .page-dp3}

1.  [Keyboards]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Keyboard
    keys are organized based on frequency of
    use]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Since
    different languages use characters at different frequencies, the
    keyboard layouts will be different]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::

::: {#More_Keyboards .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Keyboards]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    operating system will usually be responsible for mapping a keystroke
    to a character code]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't code
    any dependencies on key position or numeric key values into your
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Accelerator_Keys_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Accelerator Keys ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Accelerator
    Keys are quick ways to entering a command (i.e., hit the "U" key to
    quickly enter the "Update" command)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[When the
    word "Update" is translated, hitting the "U" key may not be
    obvious]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Shortcut_Keys .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Shortcut Keys]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Shortcut
    Keys are easy ways to perform an operation based on the location of
    the key (i.e., hit "Cntrl" and "a" to pause the
    application)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[When the
    keyboard layout is different, it may be difficult to hit both
    "Cntrl" and "a"]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Monitors .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Monitors]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Manufacturers,
    monitors and their resolution may vary in international
    markets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Avoid
    product dependencies on specific monitors or
    resolutions]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#User_Interface_Layout .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [User Interface Layout]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The User
    Interface Layout may be a "brand" of your
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    following variables may affect layout:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Font
        Size]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Expansion or Contraction ]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Text
        Orientation (Bi-Directional Text)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Others]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Printers .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Printers]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A variety
    of printers will be supported by the OS transparently to your
    product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't
    depend on a specific printer unless you are sure it will be
    supported and available in all international
    markets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Paper_Size .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Paper Size]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Paper size
    varies in different markets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Predominate
    size in Europe and Japan is A4]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't
    format output exclusively for     the domestic paper
    size]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Envelope_Size_ .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Envelope Size ]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ ]{.text-T6}

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Envelope
    size also varies]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Don't
    format envelopes specifically for domestic Business
    Envelopes]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

::: {#Abbreviations .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Abbreviations]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Each
    company has their own vocabulary and
    abbreviations]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Minimize
    the use of the unique words and acronyms]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[If you use
    acronyms, define them when you first use
    them]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Develop a
    glossary for use by translators and international
    clients]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Colors .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Colors]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The same
    color will signify different meanings in different
    countries]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Avoid
    locking in the use of a specific color]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[If color is
    part of your product "Brand" or Look-and-Feel, check with
    international staff early to identify potential problems
    ]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Audio_Output .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Audio Output]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Audio
    output may need to be localized, so keep it separate from the
    executable product]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Keep audio
    clips short to ease localization]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#Multimedia_Output .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Multimedia Output]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Multimedia
    output will also need to be localized, so keep it
    separate]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Check
    synchronization of audio and multimedia after localization
    ]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

</div>
:::
:::

1.  [Visual Information]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Visual
    information includes:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Icons]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Images]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Photographs]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Meanings of
    visual information may modified or lost in international
    markets]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

:::

::: {#Measurements .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Measurements]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Most of the
    world uses metric measurement system]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Be careful,
    you don't want to sell 10 Kilograms of material for the price of 10
    Pounds!]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

:::
:::

::: {#Legal_Financial .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Legal/Financial]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr22 style="height:11.642cm;width:22.648cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:1.905cm; top:5.08cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Legal
    and Financial markets vary around the world]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Separate
    information listed below into the Localization
    Package:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Tax
        Information]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Licensing
        conditions]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Advertisements]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Comparisons
        to other products]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Others]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

        []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm"}[]{.text-T25}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}

::: {#Exceptions_to_I18n .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [Exceptions to I18n]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[In the
    Internationalization and Localization diagram presented
    earlier:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[All
        executable code was fully
        internationalized]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[All
        language-specific and country-specific information was in the
        Localization Package]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {#More_Exceptions_to_I18n .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [More Exceptions to I18n]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[In the real
    world, market-specific code may be needed to satisfy a specific need
    of that market ]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Minimize
    the amount of market-specific code]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P20 .graphic-pr6 style="height:11.602cm;width:14.336cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.606cm; top:12.246cm; "}
<div>

</div>
:::
:::

::: {# Good_News! .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}
<div>

1.  [ ]{.text-T6}[Good News!]{.text-T6}

</div>
:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:21.185cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The
    operating system or programming language will provide a lot of
    information used by internationalized
    software]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[This
    information is provided in a ]{.text-T6}[locale]{.text-T67}[
    definition]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[A
    ]{.text-T6}[locale]{.text-T67}[ defines:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character
        set]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Character

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[User
        Interface language]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Cultural
        Dependencies (Date/Time formats)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[Territory]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd}

::: {#Installation .page-dp3}
::: {.graphic-P14 .graphic-pr4 style="height:3.598cm;width:16.722cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:6.985cm; top:0.635cm; "}

1.  [Installation]{.text-T6}

:::

::: {.graphic-P19 .graphic-pr7 style="height:11.641cm;width:22.225cm; padding:0;  position:absolute; left:2.327cm; top:5.291cm; "}
<div>

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Does the
    international installer have U.S. English language
    skills?]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[If not, the
    installation will need to be localized (and maybe
    internationalized!)]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Determine
    who is responsible for:]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[International
        installation development]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    -   [--]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.794cm;"}[International
        installation test]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

    []{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm"}[]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

</div>
:::

:::

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[The Quality
    Assurance organization now has many products to

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Testers may

    products]{.text-T6}[]{.odfLiEnd} 

-   [•]{style="display:block;float:left;min-width:0.953cm;"}[Details of
    the new international QA responsibilities is covered in another
